compositional_truth_check.Status: Registry mismatch: P2 is effectively absent/non-viable.

inventory_reconciliation.P2: Systemic Loss; only necrotic debris remains.

plant_audit.P1: Succulent foliage remains sparse; no significant growth.
plant_audit.P2: No active growth; soil surface appears barren of mint.
plant_audit.P3: Pothos leaf is yellowing/necrotic at the tip; rabbit anchor is stable.
plant_audit.P4: Single green leaf remains; no new development.

biome_observations.soil_texture: Consistently dry, granular, with perlite visible.
biome_observations.biome_anomalies: Presence of eggshell fragments in P4 pot; desk surface shows minor debris.

temporal_deltas.T-5_to_T-3: Minimal change; P3 leaf shows progressive yellowing.
temporal_deltas.T-2_to_Current: Static state; no recovery or further degradation observed in the last 48 hours.

vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of arrested development. P2 has suffered a systemic loss, with no visible mint remaining. P3 (Pothos) is exhibiting signs of nutrient deficiency or light stress, evidenced by the yellowing leaf. The environment is stable but stagnant, with no new growth observed across the 5-day sequence. The white rabbit anchor remains the only constant in an otherwise declining botanical set.
